_description: Educational reference ranges for CT-segmentation volumetric proxies. SIMULATION ONLY, not clinical thresholds. Whole-heart volume is the VISTA-3D single heart label (115); it does not split into chambers, so this is a global cardiomegaly proxy, never a chamber EF or diagnosis.

heart_total_volume_ml.note: Approximate adult whole-heart CT segmentation volume (blood pool + myocardium as one label). Coarse educational proxy only.
